notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the rsync SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 12 CVEs: CVE-2024-12086, CVE-2024-12087, CVE-2024-12088, CVE-2024-12747, CVE-2025-10158, and 7 more.
